com.truelayer.java

Class TrueLayerClientBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.truelayer.java.TrueLayerClientBuilder

  • public class TrueLayerClientBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder class for TrueLayerClient instances.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      TrueLayerClient build()
      Builds the Java library main class to interact with TrueLayer APIs.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder clientCredentials(ClientCredentials credentials)
      Utility to set the client credentials required for Oauth2 protected endpoints.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder environment(Environment environment)
      Utility to configure the library to interact a specific TrueLayer environment.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder signingOptions(SigningOptions signingOptions)
      Utility to set the signing options required for payments.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withConnectionPool(ConnectionPoolOptions connectionPoolOptions)
      Sets a connection pool for the internal HTTP client
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withCredentialsCaching()
      Utility to enable default in memory caching for Oauth credentials.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withCredentialsCaching(ICredentialsCache credentialsCache)
      Utility to enable a custom cache for Oauth credentials.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withHttpLogs()
      Utility to enable default logs for HTTP traces.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withHttpLogs(java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> logConsumer)
      Utility to enable custom logging for HTTP traces.
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withRequestExecutor(java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService requestExecutor)
      Sets a custom HTTP request dispatcher for the internal HTTP client
      TrueLayerClientBuilder withTimeout(java.time.Duration timeout)
      Utility to set a call timeout for the client.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • clientCredentials

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder clientCredentials(ClientCredentials credentials)
        Utility to set the client credentials required for Oauth2 protected endpoints.
        Parameters:
        credentials - the credentials object that holds client id and secret.
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used.
        See Also:
        ClientCredentials

      • signingOptions

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder signingOptions(SigningOptions signingOptions)
        Utility to set the signing options required for payments.
        Parameters:
        signingOptions - the signing options object that holds signature related informations.
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used.
        See Also:
        SigningOptions

      • withTimeout

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withTimeout(java.time.Duration timeout)
        Utility to set a call timeout for the client.
        Parameters:
        timeout - Optional timeout configuration that defines a time limit for a complete HTTP call. This includes resolving DNS, connecting, writing the request body, server processing, as well as reading the response body. If not set, the internal HTTP client configuration are used.
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used.

      • withConnectionPool

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withConnectionPool(ConnectionPoolOptions connectionPoolOptions)
        Sets a connection pool for the internal HTTP client
        Parameters:
        connectionPoolOptions - optional connection pool to be used
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used.

      • withRequestExecutor

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withRequestExecutor(java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService requestExecutor)
        Sets a custom HTTP request dispatcher for the internal HTTP client
        Parameters:
        requestExecutor - an executor service responsible for handling the HTTP requests
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used.

      • environment

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder environment(Environment environment)
        Utility to configure the library to interact a specific TrueLayer environment. By default, TrueLayer production environment is used.
        Parameters:
        environment - the environment to use
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used.
        See Also:
        Environment

      • withHttpLogs

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withHttpLogs()
        Utility to enable default logs for HTTP traces.
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used

      • withHttpLogs

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withHttpLogs(java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> logConsumer)
        Utility to enable custom logging for HTTP traces. Please notice that blocking in the context of this consumer invocation will affect performance. An asynchronous implementation is strongly advised.
        Parameters:
        logConsumer - a custom log consumer
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used

      • withCredentialsCaching

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withCredentialsCaching()
        Utility to enable default in memory caching for Oauth credentials.
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used

      • withCredentialsCaching

        public TrueLayerClientBuilder withCredentialsCaching(ICredentialsCache credentialsCache)
        Utility to enable a custom cache for Oauth credentials.
        Returns:
        the instance of the client builder used

      • build

        public TrueLayerClient build()
        Builds the Java library main class to interact with TrueLayer APIs.
        Returns:
        a client instance
        See Also:
        TrueLayerClient
